title: Kimetsu no Yaiba (Demon Slayer)
description: Japanese anime "Demon Slayer (Kimetsu no Yaiba)" mod
body:
### DISCLAIMER

This is a **NON-PROFIT**, fan-made project created for community enjoyment. It is **NOT** affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Koyoharu Gotouge, Shueisha, Aniplex, ufotable, or the "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba" Production Committee. **NO COPYRIGHT INFRINGEMENT IS INTENDED**. All intellectual property rights belong to their respective owners.

Use of internal data such as textures and models is **PROHIBITED**.

## 
**This mod adds decorative blocks, weapons, characters, biommes, armors and foods!**
![Rui and Tanjiro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36b3845f8c05f7557351aa7970913f02bea90d20.jpeg)

How to progress in Slayer, just follow the advancements!
For demons you have to consume blood, 3 drops of blood will make you go up one level (50 drops will make you go up to the max level, but if you keep consuming blood you will get more hearts! )

# Survival
### Path to Joining the Demon Slayer Corps
 Your initial trial to join the Demon Slayer Corps is to **defeat one Demon**.
In the original story, Demons can only be vanquished with a Nichirin Blade, but in this mod, you can defeat them with any weapon. However, Demons are considerably more powerful than vanilla zombies or skeletons, making solo defeat quite challenging. If a Demon Slayer Corps member is nearby, cooperating with them will make the fight significantly easier.

### After Joining the Demon Slayer Corps
Upon defeating a Demon, the **"Demon Slayer Corps"** advancement will automatically be achieved. Simultaneously, you will be supplied with a **Nichirin Blade, a Corps Uniform, and a Kasugai Crow** to serve as your messenger. Holding the Nichirin Blade in your hand will change its color, and you can switch forms with the R key and use Breathing Techniques by right-clicking.

In this mod, **your techniques will clash with and mitigate enemy attacks while they are in use.**
Almost all weapons in this mod generate a weak attack when swung. Use these swings to clash with and mitigate enemy attacks when you cannot use Breathing Techniques or Blood Demon Arts.

### Demon Transformation
By drinking **"Muzan's Blood,"** an item rarely obtained after defeating Demons, you can choose the path of **becoming a Demon**.
Upon transforming, sunlight becomes your weakness, you become neutral towards other Demons, and you become hostile towards the Demon Slayer Corps. Naturally, you will no longer be able to progress with your Demon Slayer Corps advancements.

## Advancement System
### As a Demon Slayer
As a Demon Slayer, continuously defeating Demons will cause your **rank to rise** and, consequently, your **stats to improve**.
To become a Hashira, the great objective of **defeating the Twelve Kizuki** awaits you.

### As a Demon
If you choose to become a Demon, your rank within the Twelve Kizuki will increase by **challenging other Demons to Blood Battles** or by **continuously defeating Demon Slayer Corps members.** To become an Upper Rank Demon, you must **defeat an Upper Rank Demon or a Hashira.**

### Special Advancements
- **"Hashira Training":** This advancement is achieved by defeating a Hashira. It is uniquely prepared for each Hashira, and completing it will increase specific stats.
- **"Pinnacle of Martial Arts":** This ultimate advancement is achieved by defeating a Hashira or Upper Rank One. From this point, by continuously fulfilling the conditions outlined in the advancement description, you can acquire powerful abilities such as the **Demon Slayer Mark.**

## World Generation
### Biomes
Numerous unique biomes modeled after locations from the original story exist.
Some entities (e.g., Rui, Sabito, etc.) will **only spawn in their respective, dedicated biomes** associated with their character.

### Structures
Many **structures** that appeared in the original story are faithfully reproduced and appear in the world. The interiors of these buildings even meticulously recreate hidden lore revealed in the fan books, offering plenty of exciting exploration for fans.

![Rui Family](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/243714d33dc914db0e76bf54598a6a541539c2ef.jpeg)

# Key Setting

R : Change breathes or blood demon arts

Right Click : Use breathing or blood demon art (need nichirin sword or blood demon art item)

S + Jump : Back Step

M : Demon slayer mark (need advancement grant)

# Commands

> /gamerule kimetsuBlockBreak <true/false>

Setting this to **true** allows skills to destroy blocks.

> /gamerule kimetsuHardcore <true/false>

Setting this to **true** prevents named characters from ever spawning again once they are defeated. If Muzan Kibutsuji is vanquished, demons will disappear from the world.

> /gamerule kimetsuPlayerGrowth <true/false>

Setting this to **false** prevents player stats from increasing with rank. In Survival mode, setting this to **false** makes it nearly impossible to complete the game.

> /gamerule kimetsuPvP <true/false>

# Helps

Change minecraft difficulty (easy, normal, or hard) if you find the game is too difficult or too easy. The strength of the entities will change greatly.

# 

### Credits
This is a fan-made recreation based on the original works: "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba" by Koyoharu Gotouge / Shueisha / Aniplex / ufotable
